description: Style NoteStructured tee from puma for the summer - you can't get cooler (literally and figuratively) than this. Play up the brand's sporty vibe and style this with slim cut cotton trousers and a washed leather jacket. Match the colour of the trousers with the jacket (keep it tonal) and pair this with a no-fuss style pair of sneakers. Product DetailsWhite round neck T-shirt, has blue tape detail along the neckline, print on the chest, short sleeves and paneling under the arm region Material and Care66% cotton, 29% polyester and 5% elastaneMachine wash inside outDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanCool iron inside outSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18")  is wearing a size M
